# Chapter 10: Eigenvalues and decompositions  (~110 pp)
- 10.1 Eigenvalues and eigenvectors (15)
- 10.2 Diagonalisation (12)
- 10.3 SVD (15)
- 10.4 Spectral methods, low-rank approximation (15)
- 10.5 Markov chains and stochastic matrices (15)
- 10.6 Power iteration and PageRank as worked example (12)
- 10.7 Failure section: when the matrix has no real eigenvectors and the engineer panics (12)
- 10.8 Worked examples: PCA, modal analysis, image compression (14)

**Archetype**: scaling, control. **Project**: implement PCA from scratch; run on a real dataset. **Exercises**: 35.
